rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/5/16. A filed stamped courtesy paper copy of all electronically filed documents requiring Court review or action needed to have been delivered not later than 1:30 p.m. of the day following electronic filing [Local Rule 2.11T]. Filed stamped copy must be delivered to Room 202 no later than 3 court days prior to continued hearing date.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE MATTER OF THE FOUAD OMAR AKKAWI POOLED SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Authorizing Disbursment Of Trust Funds For Reimbursement To Beneficiary Advocate And Payment Of Future Caregiver Services
rulings.Rulings: continued to november 1, 2016. a declaration was filed that increased the requested payment amount from $11,200 to $51,087.50. as such, that request is a material change to the petition and must be filed as an amendment to the petition. that amendment must be noticed for the full 30 day period after it has been filed. in addition, no copy of the Trustee's declaration, filed 9/6/16 was provided to the examiner.
